sizing_rule.note: Split account into inactive equity (non-trading capital) and active equity (trading capital). Apply full optimal f sizing only to active equity portion. Monitor fractional f usage to remain below margin call threshold. Example: $70k account with $58.3k inactive (83%) and $11.67k active (17%) capital.

source_rule_text: Allocate a split between inactive equity (non-trading capital) and active equity (trading capital), then trade the active portion at full optimal f values while monitoring for margin calls based on fractional f usage.
